intro:
I'm a first-year CSE student who learns by building. Right now, I'm creating practical tools that solve real-life problems.
One of my current projects is a personal knowledge system that organizes location-based information in one place—roads, transportation options, travel costs, important places, and local insights. A local AI model automatically structures the data, connects related information, and builds a searchable knowledge network, making it easy to find and understand everything without manually organizing it.
